traits.name: Adrenaline Rush
traits.description: You can take the Dash action as a Bonus Action. When you do, you gain Temporary Hit Points equal to your Proficiency Bonus. Uses equal to Proficiency Bonus; all regained on Short or Long Rest.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 120 feet.

traits.name: Relentless Endurance
traits.description: When you are reduced to 0 Hit Points but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 Hit Point instead. Once used, not again until Long Rest.
